title: The Greening Earth: Mapping Global Vegetation Change
description: An interactive 3D map using satellite-derived NDVI data to explore where vegetation increased or declined worldwide between 2000, 2013, and 2025.

title: Project 3: Interactive Climate Visualization
description: An interactive world map for exploring land-surface temperature change through year controls, regional comparisons, tooltips, and linked views.

title: BikeWatching: Boston Area Bike Traffic
description: An interactive map app for exploring bike traffic, bike lanes, and station patterns in the Boston area.

title: Project 2: Persuasive/Deceptive Visualization
description: A paired visualization project examining how visual encoding, annotations, filtering, and framing can influence an audience's interpretation.

title: Project 1: Expository Visualization
description: An expository visualization showing that ultra-processed foods cost less per 100 calories than minimally processed foods across Walmart, Target, and Whole Foods.

title: COGS 108 Group Project
description: A collaborative data science project analyzing patterns and possible predictors of power-outage duration in the United States.

title: COGS 9 Final Project
description: A final project for COGS 9 exploring data analysis and programming concepts.

title: CSE 158 Final Project
description: A machine learning project focused on recommender systems, predictive modeling, and model evaluation.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my coursework, projects, GitHub activity, and curriculum vitae.

title: CV Page
description: A curriculum vitae page presenting my education, technical skills, and selected projects.

title: Contact Form
description: A contact page with a form for sending messages through the website.

title: GitHub Profile Stats
description: A homepage feature that fetches and displays live GitHub profile statistics.
